description: A cholera outbreak has been reported in Kenema District. As the HMIS Administrator, you need to configure a new Data Set in DHIS2 (admin/district) to track the outbreak. Create a Data Set named 'Cholera Outbreak Surveillance - Kenema' (Short name: 'Cholera Surv Kenema') with a Weekly period type. Assign at least 3 existing data elements related to the outbreak (such as Cholera, Diarrhoea, Dysentery, or ORS) and assign the Data Set to the 'Kenema' district organisation unit.
